title: Fairborn UFO Conference expands to meet growing national fascination
White House Forms UFO Science Team To Study Unexplained Orbs And Declassified Military Sightings
description: The White House has established a science council, led by astrophysicist Avi Loeb, to study UFOs using modern scientific methods, aiming for stronger evidence and reliable conclusions.

title: Secret military bunker site witnessed bizarre light activity from orange orb, UFO Files reveal
description: UFO Files released by the Pentagon mention a strange event involving an orange sphere that shot out multiple red lights that then danced around and disappeared. It reportedly occurred over Cheyenne Mountain, which houses a Command Centre.

title: Steven Spielberg Claims His UFO Movie Was Based On 'Credible Foundation' and 'Circumstantial Evidence'
description: Steven Spielberg insists his new film 'Disclosure Day' is based on decades of UFO research and testimonies, reflecting a shift in public perception and mainstream interest in unexplained phenomena.

title: White House Releases New Files Showing Mysterious Orb Videos, Accounts Of UFO Sightings
description: By Elizabeth Troutman Mitchell, The Daily Signal | June 12, 2026 The White House released its third tranche of unidentified anomalous phenomena files on Friday, including firsthand accounts from government agents claiming to have observed mysterious flying objects. The files feature a memo...
